required_preferences.fact: Now runs errands on Saturdays after the artisan market concludes, shifting away from exclusive Tuesday mornings due to booth obligations and increased weekend activities.

supersedes.fact: Schedules weekly errands for Tuesday mornings only — never runs errands on weekends

required_preferences.fact: Switches to texting his parents weekly to stay in touch, but no longer organizes in-person childcare visits due to their relocation out of state

supersedes.fact: Calls his parents every Monday to organize the week’s childcare visit — avoids texting for family coordination

required_preferences.fact: Enjoys interacting with regular artisan market customers in person every Saturday, making friendly conversation and giving brief live carving demonstrations when permitted.
Holds monthly in-person meetings with local boutique owners or gallery curators to plan Timber Threads product lines and joint promotions
Never snacks during late evening work sessions; sticks to herbal tea only
Packages every order by hand with a personalized thank-you note; never uses generic packing slips

persona: A stay-at-home parent running a handmade crafts shop on Etsy
